Fidelity Information Services (FIS)

/ Featured Projects

A selection of professional work.

Modernization

Platform Modernization

  • Led the end to end modernization of the FIPS Portal
  • Improved page load performance by 40 to 60%, significantly enhancing daily operational workflows
  • Defined a modular frontend architecture to improve maintainability, scalability, and release agility
  • Reduced long term maintenance overhead and enabled faster feature rollouts through modular architecture.
Angular NgRx RxJS Nx
Visualization

Dashboards & Data Visualization

  • Designed and developed interactive dashboards for Portfolio Management and Safekeeping reports
  • Transformed overnight accounting data into visual, actionable insights for end users
  • Enabled 1000+ correspondent banks to independently analyze portfolio performance, holdings, pledges, and cashflows
Logi Info Studio Oracle Highcharts
Modernization

Trading Modernization

  • esigned and developed the Trading UI for the Trading and Funding Manager using Angular dynamic forms
  • Improved adaptability of trading workflows for client-specific needs
  • Increased operational efficiency while reducing processing overhead
Reactive Forms Angular
Risk & Compliance

Security & Compliance

  • Implemented Single Sign-On (SSO) capabilities across the FIPS Portal
  • Delivered privacy and compliance initiatives including OneTrust cookie consent integration
  • Reduced login-related support issues by 40–50%
  • Improved compliance coverage and reduced security risk across the portal user base
Logi Info Studio Oracle Highcharts
Professional Services

Product Customization

  • Worked directly with lead bank stakeholders and Professional Services teams during customer onboarding and product customization
  • Delivered white-labeled portal implementations aligned with bank branding requirements.
  • Accelerated onboarding and implementation timelines for new banking clients.
  • Improved customer adoption through branded and tailored experiences
Professional Services Micro Front Ends
Platform Modernization

Reporting Engine Modernization

  • Designed and architected the modernization of the legacy Portfolio Management system to improve processing performance and operational reliability
  • Improved processing performance by 75–80%
  • Enabled near real-time report delivery for day-side operational runs
  • Reduced production support incidents and on-call escalations by 90%
Oracle Java Connect Direct
DevOps

DevOps & Shift-Left Security

  • Integrated security scanning tools and validation extensions into developer IDEs and CI/CD pipelines
  • Established a Shift-Left security model to detect vulnerabilities earlier in the development lifecycle
  • Improved early detection of security vulnerabilities during development
Jenkins Checkmarx SonarQube
Ownership

Operational Excellence

  • Participated in a **24×7 on-call ownership model** for critical production systems
  • Improved platform reliability for business-critical financial operations.
  • Led issue triage, root cause analysis, and production incident resolution.
Ownership On-Calls
Ownership

Platform Modernization

  • Led the modernization of legacy billing data systems by migrating text based data models into an Oracle DB based architecture
  • Executed a high stakes platform migration of Telenor Group's interconnect billing system, ensuring seamless transition from legacy application to a modernized billing platform
Java struts Interconnect Billing Telecom Oracle
Ownership

Wimax OSS/BSS Lab

  • Set up and maintained WiMAX OSS/BSS simulation labs
  • Executed functional test scenarios across provisioning and network management layers to validate system behavior
  • Enabled smoother project transition and customer handover (Alcatel Lucent-France) through effective technical knowledge transfer.
WiMax BSS/OSS Telecom
Gen AI

Gen AI Integration

  • Built hands-on expertise in designing scalable GenAI application architectures for enterprise use cases
  • Developed strong practical understanding of enterprise grade RAG patterns including Hybrid Search,Metadata Filtering, Role Based Access Control, Token Usage Tracking , Evaulation Metrics etc
  • Enabled smoother project transition and customer handover (Alcatel Lucent-France) through effective technical knowledge transfer.
Langchain RAG AI Agents
AI Tools

AI Assisted Productivity

  • Built productivity-focused agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio to automate personal engineering workflows and repetitive tasks
  • Leveraged Agent Mode in GitHub Copilot for accelerated code generation, refactoring, problem-solving, and workflow automation
  • Gained applied understanding of enterprise copilots and agent-driven automation patterns increasingly used in modern software teams
Copilot Studio Power Automate M365 Copilot GitHub Copilot
